topic: A power outlet on an interior wall blows cold air, revealing a hidden room behind it.
title: Cold Air Came Out Of My Outlet | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Cold air was blowing out of a power outlet on an inside wall of my house.
scenes.image_prompt: a white electrical outlet on a plain wall, faint mist drifting from the slots, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is the wall between my bedroom and the hall closet.
scenes.image_prompt: a bedroom wall with a closed closet beside it, dim lamp light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: An interior wall. No outside. No vents.
scenes.image_prompt: a blank interior wall with a single outlet near the floor, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I felt the draft one night while charging my phone.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone charger plugged into a wall outlet, a hand held near it feeling the air, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The air smelled like a cellar that had been shut for years.
scenes.image_prompt: faint cold vapor pouring from an outlet, dust on the baseboard below, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unscrewed the cover. Behind it was not a wall. It was open space.
scenes.image_prompt: an outlet cover removed revealing a dark gap behind the wall, no studs visible, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I slid my phone camera through the hole and recorded.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone pushed into a small wall opening, screen glowing, dark hollow beyond, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The footage showed a room. A chair. A door on the far side.
scenes.image_prompt: grainy dark photo of a small empty room behind a wall, a single wooden chair and a closed door, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The room measured larger than my whole house could hold.
scenes.image_prompt: a deep hidden room stretching back farther than seems possible, dim light at the far door, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On the next recording, the chair had turned to face the hole.
scenes.image_prompt: a wooden chair in a dark hidden room now angled toward the camera, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I plastered over the outlet. The cold air finds new sockets now.
scenes.image_prompt: a patch of fresh plaster over a wall with another outlet nearby leaking faint mist, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every outlet in the house breathes cold now, and the far door is always a little more open.
scenes.image_prompt: several outlets along a dim hallway wall, thin cold vapor at each, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
